products.name: High Signal
products.description: Signal intelligence for what to build, what to watch, agent evaluation, communities, and high-level markets.
products.focus: personal command system for product opportunities
products.defaultAction: Make the weekly personal command brief useful before broadening the product.

products.name: CodeVetter
products.description: AI code review platform for personally reviewing agent-written code and finding real bugs.
products.defaultAction: Test whether agent-written-code complaints map to a sharper self-review workflow.

products.name: SaaS Maker
products.description: Foundry and fleet cockpit for project metadata, tasks, audits, deployment visibility, and reusable SaaS infrastructure.
products.focus: fleet operating system and execution bridge
products.defaultAction: Use every High Signal recommendation to create durable fleet tasks and feedback loops.

products.name: free-ai
products.description: OpenAI-compatible gateway for free and local LLM providers.
products.defaultAction: Watch local/free model trends for routing, cost-control, and privacy workflows.

products.name: anime_list
products.description: MAL Explorer and anime/manga browsing/list management product.
products.defaultAction: Track discovery/list complaints and avoid generic recommendation features.

products.name: LoopTV
products.description: TV-like app for curated YouTube channels and continuous playback.
products.defaultAction: Track content-count, playback, and curation failures as product-critical signals.

products.name: ai-game
products.description: Persistent AI world simulator and interactive RPG-style multi-agent game.
products.defaultAction: Watch agent/game complaints around persistence, narrative control, and performance.

products.name: reader
products.description: Web annotation and document reading tool.
products.defaultAction: Only revive if repeated reading/annotation complaints create a specific wedge.

products.name: email-manager
products.description: Unified email management and automation tool.
products.defaultAction: Watch agent-mediated inbox and outreach filtering changes.

products.name: truehire
products.description: AI-powered recruitment and candidate vetting platform.
products.defaultAction: Watch hiring proof, screening, and agent-evaluation shifts before investing.
